title: Flames is a Hot Guy
description: Specified players are immune to fire damage and instead take damage from water. Just like other fire-based entities!
body:
![Fire Immunity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dhpRo65B/images/5a45521dbed5d60acfceb450cacb4d5fc6ae819c.png)

![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-server%20or%20singleplayer-00AF5C)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/807935906055979039?logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=discord&color=6577E6
)
](https://discord.gg/HermTPzzG3)
[![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UC4kkLkiJTtmlTCuFExqtFKA?style=flat&logo=youtube&label=youtube&color=FF323D)](https://www.youtube.com/@flamesatgames)
[![Patreon](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https%3A%2F%2Fshieldsio-patreon.vercel.app%2Fapi%3Fusername%3Dflamesatgames%26type%3Dpatrons&style=flat)](https://patreon.com/flamesatgames)

**flamesatgames** is automatically granted the "Hot Guy" property upon joining.

Use `/function flamesatgames:hot_guy_toggle` if **you** wanna experience true hotness!

Players who have this property will:
- **Be immune to all fire-based damage**
  - This includes fire, lava, magma blocks, campfires, Fire Aspect, etc.
  - Fire-based mobs like Blazes will still target you, but they can't set you on fire.
- **Take damage when exposed to rain**
  - Can be avoided by drinking a Water Breathing potion or wearing a helmet.
- **Take damage when touching water**
  - This damage is equal to what regular players take from lava.
  - Damage is reduced by wearing armor (armor does not lose durability).
  - Can be avoided by drinking a Water Breathing potion.
